selections.name: I Drove All Night
selections.reason: Strong recent form at Toowoomba, looks ready to break through in this field.

selections.name: Alkebulan
selections.reason: Drawn well and has been racing consistently. Major player.

selections.name: Rainbow Glitter
selections.reason: Wet track form is a plus, can feature in the finish.

selections.name: Concador
selections.reason: Fitter for recent run here, can improve into the placings.

danger_horse.name: Mishpat
danger_horse.reason: Could surprise if she finds her best form.

selections.name: Before Anyone Else
selections.reason: Perfect inside draw, trialling well and has class. Hard to beat.

selections.name: Howdoyouzou
selections.reason: Consistent type with solid figures, definite threat despite the wide gate.

selections.name: Jeans
selections.reason: Drawn to get a soft run, can bounce back here.

selections.name: Switch The Stars
selections.reason: Classy but carries top weight on a wet track.

danger_horse.name: Mishani Aztec
danger_horse.reason: Light weight and can run a cheeky race.

selections.name: Brass Band
selections.reason: Great draw and comes off a solid placing at Sunshine Coast.

selections.name: Cairo Queen
selections.reason: Placed on heavy going recently, fit and ready.

selections.name: Teddy Too Cheap
selections.reason: Dropping in grade and drawn well to feature.

selections.name: Mud 'N' Blood
selections.reason: Fair effort here last time, can sneak into the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Winning Flame
danger_horse.reason: Capable of better than recent runs suggest.

selections.name: Lift'n'mehigher
selections.reason: Coming off a win and gets the coveted inside alley.

selections.name: Sistine Chapel
selections.reason: Well weighted, drawn perfectly, and has placed here.

selections.name: Frothsay
selections.reason: Drops in class and gets a great draw to improve sharply.

selections.name: Cheerful Cat
selections.reason: Consistent performer who can overcome the wide gate.

danger_horse.name: Torvecchio
danger_horse.reason: Won last start but carries a hefty weight penalty here.

selections.name: Lights Will Guide
selections.reason: Won here last start in similar conditions, drawn well.

selections.name: Southoftheborder
selections.reason: Solid run here recently and gets a soft draw.

selections.name: Trusty Bandit
selections.reason: Racing consistently and looks a strong each-way chance.

selections.name: Papal Miss
selections.reason: Gets the inside run and drops in grade, keep safe.

danger_horse.name: Brave Boy
danger_horse.reason: Light weight and a good draw give him a knockout chance.

selections.name: Bombus
selections.reason: Strong form at Toowoomba, the one to beat despite the draw.

selections.name: Yonaka
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly to sit on the pace and give a sight.

selections.name: Next Exit
selections.reason: Solid form at Sunshine Coast, commands respect.

selections.name: Express Star
selections.reason: Inside draw is a massive plus, can improve sharply.

danger_horse.name: Outages
danger_horse.reason: Capable of running into the placings on his best form.

selections.name: Speed Map
selections.reason: Won here last start, drawn perfectly to repeat the dose.

selections.name: Fortysecondstreet
selections.reason: Lightly weighted, great draw, and in good form.

selections.name: Vorkuta
selections.reason: Solid form at Gold Coast, looks a genuine contender.

selections.name: Ceekay's Choice
selections.reason: Inside draw and good recent form make her dangerous.

danger_horse.name: Jemeldi
danger_horse.reason: Classy type but the wide draw is a concern.

selections.name: What Did You Say
selections.reason: Gets the gun run from the inside alley, ready to peak.

selections.name: Final Voyage
selections.reason: Drawn well and can improve significantly in this grade.

selections.name: Thief By Night
selections.reason: Solid form and drawn to get a competitive run.

selections.name: Bold As Brass
selections.reason: Good form here but the extreme wide draw is a major hurdle.

danger_horse.name: Amore Sirena
danger_horse.reason: Can run a cheeky race if she handles the conditions.
